name: Dell: Applying Its Business Value Model to Storage
description: This Aberdeen Group vendor profile examines how Dell applies its signature supply chain management and price/performance business model to enterprise storage in 2004. Co-authored by David Hill and Peter Kastner, the report covers the Dell|EMC CX product family (third-generation FC arrays), the new AX100 entry-level SATA SAN, Dell PowerVault NAS solutions, and Dell's software bundling and service integration strategies. Aberdeen concludes that Dell deserves a place at the business storage discussion table across all enterprise sizes.
